calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-23-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-23-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. apecial appearance for the Plaintiff: Citibank, N.A.
Declaration in lieu of live testimony at trial (CCP 98) was presented and reviewed in open court.
No appearance by Defendant Anthony H. Santucci.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:
Principal - $5723.41
Attorney Fees - none
Costs - $370.00
Total - $6,093.41
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Motion And Otion For Order Deeming Pltfs' Request For Admission Of The Genuiness Of Documents Set One Admitted;
Off Calendar Jan-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted.
PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA), N.A.'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Deeming admissions of the genuiniess of documents set one admitted is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Pro Tem Judge: Brad Kaplan, not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Deeming Pltf'S Request For Admissions Set One Admitted
Off Calendar Jan-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted.
PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA), N.A.'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Deeming Request For Admissions Set One Admitted is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Pro Tem Judge: Brad Kaplan, not reported.
